component.name: Alurtmee
component.summary: A calm watch over your GitHub pull requests

description.p: Alurtmee is a desktop companion that keeps an eye on the GitHub repositories you care about. Point it at your repos and it shows — at a glance — which pull requests are open, who's behind them, whether CI is passing, and what needs your attention. When a build fails or a workflow drags, it taps you on the shoulder with a desktop notification. The rest of the time it stays quiet and out of the way.

ul.li: Every open pull request across the repos you pick, with reviews, comment threads and test status
Each PR tagged human or bot and feature or security, with one-click corrections that stick
Desktop notifications the moment CI fails or a workflow runs slower than usual
One-click filter chips to cut the noise
Six hand-built dark themes, switchable on the fly
Light and private — your token is stored only in the system keychain

description.p: First release: a calm Linux desktop app for keeping an eye on your GitHub pull requests.
